Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 305}I'll be a third-year soon, which means I'll be studying for exams every single day.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 305}But that doesn't mean I'm giving up the hunt for mysterious stuff like that observatory.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 305}Having an inquisitive mind is important for people.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 305}And it's what makes me so interesting to talk to.[n]{f 1 1}
